original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: react-native-expert
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Senior React Native and Expo engineer for building production-ready cross-platform mobile apps. Use when building React Native components, implementing navigation with Expo Router, optimizing list and scroll performance, working with animations via Reanimated, handling platform-specific code (iOS/Android), integrating native modules, or structuring Expo projects. Triggers on React Native, Expo, mobile app, iOS app, Android app, cross-platform, native module, FlatList, FlashList, LegendList, Reanimated, Expo Router, mobile performance, app store. Do NOT use for Flutter, web-only React, or backend Node.js tasks.
original_frontmatter_snapshot.author: Felipe Rodrigues - github.com/felipfr
